blocks.text: User: How much did I spend on ride sharing this week?
Tool Call (Gmail Query Search) query: "uber OR lyft"
Thinking: I found the following emails that mention Uber and Lyft, I need to find the cost of each email.
User: How much did I spend on ride sharing this week?

gmail_search.ts "from:(uber.com OR lyft.com OR uber OR lyft) subject:(receipt OR trip) newer_than:7d | grep -oE '$[0-9]+\.[0-9]{2}' | sed 's/^$//' | \ awk '{sum += $1} END {printf "Total spent on ride sharing this week: $%.2f\n", sum}'
